heading: Funds out of Capitol Buildings, Architect of the Capitol Appropriation
label: 1864 Funds out of Capitol Buildings, Architect of the Capitol Appropriation
text: On and after , the Architect of the Capitol may incur expenses authorized by to be paid from the appropriation “Capitol Buildings, Architect of the Capitol”.October 18, 1986section 1818 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 166f of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub.
